name: ASUS PRIME B650-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR4-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME B650-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0
description: Entry-level PRIME ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR4 support, dual LAN, and WiFi 6E.
